action.description:
Description:  
Sets the slack channel details to post alerts into. Requires the channel name and channel ID.

Params:  
- `channel_name` (str): Channel name as seen in slack. Example: "#s1-alerts"
- `channel_id` (str): Channel ID pulled via slack API. Example: " "C123B23A1R"

variables.name: dynamic_message_jq
resync_message_jq
mitigation_button_jq
response_action_data_jq
isolation_block_jq
overview_jq
trigger_overview_jq
endpoint_details_jq
threat_details_jq

action.description: Assign values to variables to store and manipulate data within your workflow. Variables can be used to store data that can be referenced and modified throughout the workflow.
This method posts a message to a public channel, private channel, or direct message/IM channel.
This method posts a message to a public channel, private channel, or direct message/IM channel.

data.name: Get UAM Threat Status

action.description: SentinelOne connection (GraphQL)
This method updates a message to a public channel, private channel, or direct message/IM channel.

Provide a thread_ts value for the posted message to act as a reply to a parent message. 
Sparingly set reply_broadcast to true if your reply is important enough for everyone in the channel to receive.

variables.name: attachment_data_jq
variables.value:
. as $val |
{
  apiEndpoint: (
    if $val == "threat-details" then "/web/api/v2.1/unifiedalerts/graphql?opname=GetAlert"
    elif $val == "overview" then "/web/api/v2.1/unifiedalerts/graphql?opname=GetAlert"
    elif $val == "endpoint-details" then "/web/api/v2.1/agents?uuid={{edr-or-identity-alert.data.asset.agentUuid}}"
    elif $val == "notes" then "/web/api/v2.1/unifiedalerts/graphql?opname=GetAlertNotes"
    else "UNKNOWN_ENDPOINT"
    end
  ),
  log_message: ("Selection value was: " + $val),
  isGraphql: (
    if $val == "endpoint-details" then false else true end
  ),
  type: $val,
  request_body: (
    if $val == "threat-details" then "{\"operationName\": \"GetAlert\", \"variables\": {\"skipName\": false, \"skipAsset\": false, \"skipResult\": false, \"skipStatus\": false, \"skipProcess\": false, \"skipRawData\": false, \"skipRealTime\": false, \"skipCounters\": false, \"skipAssignee\": false, \"skipSeverity\": false, \"skipAnalytics\": false, \"skipCreatedAt\": false, \"skipUpdatedAt\": false, \"skipIndicators\": false, \"skipExternalId\": true, \"skipDetectedAt\": false, \"skipLastSeenAt\": false, \"skipObservables\": false, \"skipDescription\": false, \"skipFirstSeenAt\": false, \"skipStorylineId\": false, \"skipDetectionTime\": false, \"skipAnalystVerdict\": false, \"skipClassification\": false, \"skipDetectionSource\": false, \"skipConfidenceLevel\": false, \"skipEnrichments\": true, \"id\": \"{{edr-or-identity-alert.data.id}}\"}, \"query\": \"fragment Asset on Asset {\\n  id\\n  name\\n  osType\\n  policy\\n  category\\n  osVersion\\n  agentUuid\\n  subcategory\\n  agentVersion\\n  pendingReboot\\n  lastLoggedInUser\\n  connectivityToConsole\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Counter on Counter {\\n  key\\n  value\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Analytics on Analytics {\\n  uid\\n  name\\n  typeValue\\n  category\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Observable on Observable {\\n  name\\n  type\\n  value\\n  typeName\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionSource on DetectionSource {\\n  vendor\\n  engine\\n  product\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment IntEnrichment on IntEnrichment {\\n  intValue\\n  name\\n  path\\n  provider\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment LocationEnrichment on LocationEnrichment {\\n  latitude\\n  longitude\\n  name\\n  path\\n  provider\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment GeoLocationEnrichment on GeoLocationEnrichment {\\n  city\\n  coordinates {\\n    latitude\\n    longitude\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  country\\n  name\\n  path\\n  postalCode\\n  provider\\n  region\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment ReputationEnrichment on ReputationEnrichment {\\n  name\\n  path\\n  provider\\n  scoreType\\n  scoreValue\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment StringEnrichment on StringEnrichment {\\n  name\\n  path\\n  provider\\n  stringValue\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment TimestampEnrichment on TimestampEnrichment {\\n  name\\n  path\\n  provider\\n  timestampValue\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Site on Site {\\n  id\\n  name\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Group on Group {\\n  id\\n  name\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Account on Account {\\n  id\\n  name\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Scope on Scope {\\n  site {\\n    ...Site\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  group {\\n    ...Group\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  account {\\n    ...Account\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment RealTime on RealTime {\\n  scope {\\n    ...Scope\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Tactic on Tactic {\\n  uid\\n  name\\n  sourceUrl\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Technique on Technique {\\n  uid\\n  name\\n  sourceUrl\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Attack on Attack {\\n  version\\n  tactic {\\n    ...Tactic\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  technique {\\n    ...Technique\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Indicator on Indicator {\\n  id\\n  uid\\n  type\\n  message\\n  severity\\n  eventTime\\n  attacks {\\n    ...Attack\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  observables {\\n    ...Observable\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment FileDetail on FileDetail {\\n  md5\\n  name\\n  path\\n  size\\n  sha1\\n  sha256\\n  certSubject\\n  certExpiresAt\\n  certSerialNumber\\n  signatureVerification\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment ProcessDetail on ProcessDetail {\\n  cmdLine\\n  username\\n  parentName\\n  file {\\n    ...FileDetail\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionAsset on DetectionAsset {\\n  ipV4\\n  ipV6\\n  policy\\n  domain\\n  osName\\n  osType\\n  osRevision\\n  agentVersion\\n  consoleIpAddress\\n  subscriptionTime\\n  lastLoggedInUser\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionKubernetes on DetectionKubernetes {\\n  podName\\n  nodeName\\n  podLabels\\n  nodeLabels\\n  clusterName\\n  containerId\\n  namespaceName\\n  containerName\\n  controllerName\\n  controllerType\\n  namespaceLabels\\n  containerLabels\\n  controllerLabels\\n  containerImageName\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment SimpleScopeResponse on SimpleScopeResponse {\\n  siteName\\n  groupName\\n  accountName\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionAttackerDetails on DetectionAttackerDetails {\\n  ip\\n  host\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionTargetUserDetails on DetectionTargetUserDetails {\\n  name\\n  domain\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionAws on DetectionAws {\\n  tags\\n  role\\n  vpcId\\n  region\\n  imageId\\n  subnetIds\\n  accountId\\n  instanceId\\n  instanceType\\n  securityGroups\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionGcp on DetectionGcp {\\n  tags\\n  zone\\n  vpcId\\n  imageId\\n  projectId\\n  instanceId\\n  instanceType\\n  serviceAccount\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionAzure on DetectionAzure {\\n  tags\\n  region\\n  imageId\\n  instanceId\\n  instanceType\\n  resourceGroup\\n  subscriptionId\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionCloud on DetectionCloud {\\n  tags\\n  image\\n  network\\n  location\\n  accountId\\n  instanceId\\n  instanceSize\\n  cloudProvider\\n  providerDetails {\\n    ...DetectionAws\\n    ...DetectionGcp\\n    ...DetectionAzure\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionTime on DetectionTime {\\n  scope {\\n    ...SimpleScopeResponse\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  asset {\\n    ...DetectionAsset\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  cloud {\\n    ...DetectionCloud\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  attacker {\\n    ...DetectionAttackerDetails\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  targetUser {\\n    ...DetectionTargetUserDetails\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  kubernetes {\\n    ...DetectionKubernetes\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nquery GetAlert($id: ID!, $skipName: Boolean! = false, $skipAsset: Boolean! = false, $skipResult: Boolean! = false, $skipStatus: Boolean! = false, $skipProcess: Boolean! = false, $skipRawData: Boolean! = false, $skipRealTime: Boolean! = false, $skipCounters: Boolean! = false, $skipAssignee: Boolean! = false, $skipSeverity: Boolean! = false, $skipAnalytics: Boolean! = false, $skipCreatedAt: Boolean! = false, $skipUpdatedAt: Boolean! = false, $skipIndicators: Boolean! = false, $skipExternalId: Boolean! = false, $skipDetectedAt: Boolean! = false, $skipLastSeenAt: Boolean! = false, $skipObservables: Boolean! = false, $skipDescription: Boolean! = false, $skipFirstSeenAt: Boolean! = false, $skipStorylineId: Boolean! = false, $skipDetectionTime: Boolean! = false, $skipAnalystVerdict: Boolean! = false, $skipClassification: Boolean! = false, $skipDetectionSource: Boolean! = false, $skipConfidenceLevel: Boolean! = false, $skipEnrichments: Boolean! = false) {\\n  alert(id: $id) {\\n    id\\n    name @skip(if: $skipName)\\n    result @skip(if: $skipResult)\\n    status @skip(if: $skipStatus)\\n    rawData @skip(if: $skipRawData)\\n    severity @skip(if: $skipSeverity)\\n    createdAt @skip(if: $skipCreatedAt)\\n    updatedAt @skip(if: $skipUpdatedAt)\\n    externalId @skip(if: $skipExternalId)\\n    detectedAt @skip(if: $skipDetectedAt)\\n    lastSeenAt @skip(if: $skipLastSeenAt)\\n    description @skip(if: $skipDescription)\\n    firstSeenAt @skip(if: $skipFirstSeenAt)\\n    storylineId @skip(if: $skipStorylineId)\\n    analystVerdict @skip(if: $skipAnalystVerdict)\\n    classification @skip(if: $skipClassification)\\n    confidenceLevel @skip(if: $skipConfidenceLevel)\\n    assignee @skip(if: $skipAssignee) {\\n      email\\n      userId\\n      fullName\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    asset @skip(if: $skipAsset) {\\n      ...Asset\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    process @skip(if: $skipProcess) {\\n      ...ProcessDetail\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    realTime @skip(if: $skipRealTime) {\\n      ...RealTime\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    counters @skip(if: $skipCounters) {\\n      ...Counter\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    analytics @skip(if: $skipAnalytics) {\\n      ...Analytics\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    indicators @skip(if: $skipIndicators) {\\n      ...Indicator\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    observables @skip(if: $skipObservables) {\\n      ...Observable\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    detectionTime @skip(if: $skipDetectionTime) {\\n      ...DetectionTime\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    detectionSource @skip(if: $skipDetectionSource) {\\n      ...DetectionSource\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    enrichments @skip(if: $skipEnrichments) {\\n      ...IntEnrichment\\n      ...LocationEnrichment\\n      ...ReputationEnrichment\\n      ...StringEnrichment\\n      ...TimestampEnrichment\\n      ...GeoLocationEnrichment\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n}\"}"
    elif $val == "overview" then "{\"operationName\": \"GetAlert\", \"variables\": {\"skipName\": false, \"skipAsset\": false, \"skipResult\": false, \"skipStatus\": false, \"skipProcess\": false, \"skipRawData\": false, \"skipRealTime\": false, \"skipCounters\": false, \"skipAssignee\": false, \"skipSeverity\": false, \"skipAnalytics\": false, \"skipCreatedAt\": false, \"skipUpdatedAt\": false, \"skipIndicators\": false, \"skipExternalId\": true, \"skipDetectedAt\": false, \"skipLastSeenAt\": false, \"skipObservables\": false, \"skipDescription\": false, \"skipFirstSeenAt\": false, \"skipStorylineId\": false, \"skipDetectionTime\": false, \"skipAnalystVerdict\": false, \"skipClassification\": false, \"skipDetectionSource\": false, \"skipConfidenceLevel\": false, \"skipEnrichments\": true, \"id\": \"{{edr-or-identity-alert.data.id}}\"}, \"query\": \"fragment Asset on Asset {\\n  id\\n  name\\n  osType\\n  policy\\n  category\\n  osVersion\\n  agentUuid\\n  subcategory\\n  agentVersion\\n  pendingReboot\\n  lastLoggedInUser\\n  connectivityToConsole\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Counter on Counter {\\n  key\\n  value\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment StringEnrichment {\\n  name\\n  path\\n  provider\\n  stringValue\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment TimestampEnrichment on TimestampEnrichment {\\n  name\\n  path\\n  provider\\n  timestampValue\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment RealTime on RealTime {\\n  scope {\\n    ...Scope\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Tactic on Tactic {\\n  uid\\n  name\\n  sourceUrl\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Technique on Technique {\\n  uid\\n  name\\n  sourceUrl\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Attack on Attack {\\n  version\\n  tactic {\\n    ...Tactic\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  technique {\\n    ...Technique\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment Indicator on Indicator {\\n  id\\n  uid\\n  type\\n  message\\n  severity\\n  eventTime\\n  attacks {\\n    ...Attack\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  observables {\\n    ...Observable\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment FileDetail on FileDetail {\\n  md5\\n  name\\n  path\\n  size\\n  sha1\\n  sha256\\n  certSubject\\n  certExpiresAt\\n  certSerialNumber\\n  signatureVerification\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment ProcessDetail on ProcessDetail {\\n  cmdLine\\n  username\\n  parentName\\n  file {\\n    ...FileDetail\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionAsset on DetectionAsset {\\n  ipV4\\n  ipV6\\n  policy\\n  domain\\n  osName\\n  osType\\n  osRevision\\n containerImageName\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment SimpleScopeResponse on SimpleScopeResponse {\\n  siteName\\n  groupName\\n  accountName\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nfragment DetectionAttackerDetails on kubernetes {\\n    ...DetectionKubernetes\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nquery GetAlert($id: ID!, $skipName: Boolean! = false, $skipAsset: Boolean! = false, $skipResult: Boolean! = $skipSeverity: Boolean! = false, $skipAnalytics: Boolean! = false, $skipCreatedAt: Boolean! = false, $skipUpdatedAt: Boolean! = false, $skipIndicators: Boolean! = false, $skipExternalId: Boolean! = false, $skipDetectedAt: Boolean! = false, $skipLastSeenAt: Boolean! = false, $skipObservables: Boolean! = false, $skipDescription: Boolean! = false, $skipFirstSeenAt: Boolean! = false, $skipStorylineId: Boolean! = false, $skipDetectionTime: Boolean! = false, $skipAnalystVerdict: Boolean! = false, $skipClassification: Boolean! = false, $skipDetectionSource: Boolean! = false, $skipConfidenceLevel: Boolean! = false, $skipEnrichments: Boolean! = false) {\\n  alert(id: $id) {\\n    id\\n    name @skip(if: $skipName)\\n    result @skip(if: $skipResult)\\n    status @skip(if: $skipStatus)\\n    rawData @skip(if: $skipRawData)\\n    severity @skip(if: $skipSeverity)\\n    createdAt @skip(if: $skipCreatedAt)\\n    updatedAt @skip(if: $skipUpdatedAt)\\n    externalId @skip(if: $skipExternalId)\\n    detectedAt @skip(if: $skipDetectedAt)\\n    lastSeenAt @skip(if: $skipLastSeenAt)\\n    description @skip(if: $skipDescription)\\n    firstSeenAt @skip(if: $skipFirstSeenAt)\\n    storylineId @skip(if: $skipStorylineId)\\n    analystVerdict @skip(if: $skipAnalystVerdict)\\n    classification @skip(if: $skipClassification)\\n    confidenceLevel @skip(if: $skipConfidenceLevel)\\n    assignee @skip(if: $skipAssignee) {\\n      email\\n      userId\\n      fullName\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    asset @skip(if: $skipAsset) {\\n      ...Asset\\n @skip(if: $skipIndicators) {\\n      ...Indicator\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    observables @skip(if: $skipObservables) {\\n      ...Observable\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    detectionTime enrichments @skip(if: $skipEnrichments) {\\n      ...IntEnrichment\\n      ...LocationEnrichment\\n      ...ReputationEnrichment\\n      ...StringEnrichment\\n      ...TimestampEnrichment\\n      ...GeoLocationEnrichment\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n}\"}"
    elif $val == "endpoint-details" then ""
    elif $val == "notes" then "{\"operationName\": \"GetAlertNotes\", \"query\": \"fragment User on User {\\n  email\\n  userId\\n  fullName\\n  __typename\\n}\\n\\nquery GetAlertNotes($alertId: ID!, $skipText: Boolean! = false, $skipAuthor: Boolean! = false, $skipAlertId: Boolean! = false, $skipCreatedAt: Boolean! = false, $skipUpdatedAt: Boolean! = false) {\\n  alertNotes(alertId: $alertId) {\\n    data {\\n      id\\n      text @skip(if: $skipText)\\n      alertId @skip(if: $skipAlertId)\\n      createdAt @skip(if: $skipCreatedAt)\\n      updatedAt @skip(if: $skipUpdatedAt)\\n      author @skip(if: $skipAuthor) {\\n        ...User\\n        __typename\\n      }\\n      __typename\\n    }\\n    __typename\\n  }\\n}\", \"variables\": {\"alertId\": \"{{edr-or-identity-alert.data.id}}\", \"skipAlertId\": false, \"skipAuthor\": false, \"skipCreatedAt\": false, \"skipText\": false, \"skipUpdatedAt\": false}}"
    else "{}"
    end
  ),
  attachment_jq: (
    if $val == "threat-details" then ".body.data.alert.result as $last_attachment | \n.body.data.alert.confidenceLevel as $last_confidence | \n{\n  \"attachments\": [\n    {\n      \"color\": (\n        if $last_attachment == \"MITIGATED\" then \"#1eb883\"\n        elif $last_attachment == \"UNMITIGATED\" and $last_confidence == \"MALICIOUS\" then \"#f65151\"\n        elif $last_attachment == \"UNMITIGATED\" and $last_confidence == \"SUSPICIOUS\" then \"#d7b93d\"\n        else \"#9562e7\"\n        end\n      ),\n      \"blocks\": [\n        { \n          \"type\": \"divider\" \n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```\" \n              + (if .body.data.alert.asset.connectivityToConsole == \"ONLINE\" then \"🟢\" else \"🔴\" end)\n              + \" | \" + .body.data.alert.asset.name\n              + \" | \"\n              + \"\\n\" + .body.data.alert.detectionTime.scope.accountName + \" / \" + .body.data.alert.detectionTime.scope.siteName + \" / \" + .body.data.alert.detectionTime.scope.groupName\n              + \"```\" + \"\\n\"\n            )\n          },\n          \"accessory\": {\n            \"type\": \"static_select\",\n            \"initial_option\": {\n              \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Threat Details\", \"emoji\": true },\n              \"value\": \"threat-details\"\n            },\n            \"options\": [\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Overview\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"overview\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Threat Details\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"threat-details\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Endpoint Details\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"endpoint-details\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Notes\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"notes\" }\n            ],\n            \"action_id\": \"static_select-action\"\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```\"\n              + \"Status   : \" + .body.data.alert.status\n              + \"\\nAssigned : \" + ( .body.data.alert.assignee.fullName // \"Not Assigned\" )\n              + \"\\nVerdict  : \" + .body.data.alert.analystVerdict\n              + \"\\nResult   : \" + .body.data.alert.result\n              + \"\\nSeverity : \" + .body.data.alert.severity\n              + \"```\"\n            )\n          },\n          \"accessory\": {\n            \"type\": \"image\",\n            \"image_url\": \"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Perrtyk/logos/ddd133624280ad7fb719a98caefc3efabcb9a990/s1-logo-rounded.png\",\n            \"alt_text\": \"Threat Icon\"\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```| Threat Details |\"\n\t\t\t  + \"\\nName             : \" + .body.data.alert.name\n              + \"\\nConfidence       : \" + .body.data.alert.confidenceLevel\n              + \"\\nDescription      : \" + .body.data.alert.rawData.finding.desc\n              + \"\\nDetection Source : \" + .body.data.alert.rawData.analytic.name\n              + \"\\nDetecion Engine  : \" + .body.data.alert.rawData.finding_info.analytic.category\n              + \"\\nDetection Type   : \" + .body.data.alert.rawData.finding_info.analytic.type\n              + \"\\nFirst Seen       : \" \n              + ( .body.data.alert.rawData.finding.first_seen_time\n                  | tonumber\n                  | (./1000)            # ↪ convert ms → s\n                  | gmtime\n                  | strftime(\"%d %B %Y %H:%M:%S UTC\") )\n              + \"\\nLast Seen        : \" \n              + ( .body.data.alert.rawData.finding.last_seen_time\n                  | tonumber\n                  | (./1000)\n                  | gmtime\n                  | strftime(\"%d %B %Y %H:%M:%S UTC\") )\n              + \"\\n\\n| File Details |\"\n\t\t\t  + \"\\nName : \" + .body.data.alert.process.file.name\n\t\t\t  + \"\\nPath : \" + .body.data.alert.process.file.path\n              + \"\\nSHA1 : \" + .body.data.alert.process.file.sha1\n\t\t\t  + \"\\nSize : \" +\n                    (if .body.data.alert.process.file.size >= 1048576\n                    then (((.body.data.alert.process.file.size/1048576)*100 | floor)/100 | tostring) + \" MB\" else\n                    (((.body.data.alert.process.file.size/1024)*100 | floor)/100 | tostring) + \" KB\" end)\n              + \"```\"\n            )\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"context\",\n          \"elements\": [\n            {\n              \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n              \"text\": (\n                \"SentinelOne Hyperautomation | Last Sync: \"\n                + (now | gmtime | strftime(\"%d %b | %I:%M:%S %p UTC\"))\n              )\n            }\n          ]\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n"
    elif $val == "overview" then "{\n  \"attachments\": [\n    {\n      \"color\": (\n        if .body.data.alert.result == \"MITIGATED\" then \"#1eb883\"\n        elif .body.data.alert.result == \"UNMITIGATED\" and .body.data.alert.confidenceLevel == \"MALICIOUS\" then \"#f65151\"\n        elif .body.data.alert.result == \"UNMITIGATED\" and .body.data.alert.confidenceLevel == \"SUSPICIOUS\" then \"#d7b93d\"\n        else \"#9562e7\"\n        end\n      ),\n      \"blocks\": [\n        { \n          \"type\": \"divider\" \n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```\" + .body.data.alert.name\n              + \" on \" + .body.data.alert.asset.name\n              + \"```\" + \"\\n\"\n            )\n          },\n          \"accessory\": {\n            \"type\": \"static_select\",\n            \"initial_option\": {\n              \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Overview\", \"emoji\": true },\n              \"value\": \"overview\"\n            },\n            \"options\": [\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Overview\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"overview\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Threat Details\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"threat-details\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Endpoint Details\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"endpoint-details\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Notes\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"notes\" }\n            ],\n            \"action_id\": \"static_select-action\"\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```Status   : \" + .body.data.alert.status\n              + \"\\nAssigned : \" + .body.data.alert.assignee.fullName\n              + \"\\nVerdict  : \" + .body.data.alert.analystVerdict\n              + \"\\nResult   : \" + .body.data.alert.result\n              + \"\\nSeverity : \" + .body.data.alert.severity\n              + \"```\"\n            )\n          },\n          \"accessory\": {\n            \"type\": \"image\",\n            \"image_url\": \"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Perrtyk/logos/ddd133624280ad7fb719a98caefc3efabcb9a990/s1-logo-rounded.png\",\n            \"alt_text\": \"Threat Icon\"\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```Category     : \" + .body.data.alert.classification\n              + \"\\nAsset Name   : \" + .body.data.alert.asset.name\n              + \"\\nDetected At  : \" + .body.data.alert.detectedAt\n              + \"\\nFile Name    : \" + .body.data.alert.process.file.name\n              + \"\\nProcess Path : \" + .body.data.alert.process.file.path\n              + \"\\nHash (SHA1)  : \" + .body.data.alert.process.file.sha1\n              + \"```\"\n            )\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"context\",\n          \"elements\": [\n            {\n              \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n              \"text\": (\n                \"SentinelOne Hyperautomation | Last Sync: \"\n                + (now | gmtime | strftime(\"%d %b | %I:%M:%S %p UTC\"))\n              )\n            }\n          ]\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}"
    elif $val == "endpoint-details" then "\"{{local_var.current_result}}\" as $last_attachment | \n\"{{local_var.current_confidenceLevel}}\" as $last_confidence | \n{\n  \"attachments\": [\n    {\n      \"color\": (\n        if $last_attachment == \"MITIGATED\" then \"#1eb883\"\n        elif $last_attachment == \"UNMITIGATED\" and $last_confidence == \"MALICIOUS\" then \"#f65151\"\n        elif $last_attachment == \"UNMITIGATED\" and $last_confidence == \"SUSPICIOUS\" then \"#d7b93d\"\n        else \"#9562e7\"\n        end\n      ),\n      \"blocks\": [\n        { \n          \"type\": \"divider\" \n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```\" \n              + (if .body.data[0].isActive == true then \"🟢\" else \"🔴\" end)\n              + \" | \" + .body.data[0].computerName\n              + \" | \" + .body.data[0].lastIpToMgmt\n              + \"\\n\" + .body.data[0].accountName + \" / \" + .body.data[0].siteName + \" / \" + .body.data[0].groupName\n              + \"```\" + \"\\n\"\n            )\n          },\n          \"accessory\": {\n            \"type\": \"static_select\",\n            \"initial_option\": {\n              \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Endpoint Details\", \"emoji\": true },\n              \"value\": \"endpoint-details\"\n            },\n            \"options\": [\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Overview\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"overview\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Threat Details\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"threat-details\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Endpoint Details\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"endpoint-details\" },\n              { \"text\": { \"type\": \"plain_text\", \"text\": \"Notes\", \"emoji\": true }, \"value\": \"notes\" }\n            ],\n            \"action_id\": \"static_select-action\"\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```| Agent Info |\"\n              + \"\\nLast Login  : \" + .body.data[0].lastLoggedInUserName\n              + \"\\nLast Active : \" + .body.data[0].lastActiveDate\n              + \"\\nPolicy Sus  : \" + .body.data[0].mitigationModeSuspicious\n              + \"\\nPolicy Mal  : \" + .body.data[0].mitigationMode\n              + \"\\nVersion     : \" + .body.data[0].agentVersion\n              + \"\\nUpdated     : \" + ( .body.data[0].isUpToDate | if . then \"Yes\" else \"No\" end )\n              + \"```\"\n            )\n          },\n          \"accessory\": {\n            \"type\": \"image\",\n            \"image_url\": \"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Perrtyk/logos/ddd133624280ad7fb719a98caefc3efabcb9a990/s1-logo-rounded.png\",\n            \"alt_text\": \"Threat Icon\"\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\n              \"```| Endpoint Info |\"\n\t\t\t  + \"\\nType         : \" + (.body.data[0].machineType | (.[0:1] | ascii_upcase) + .[1:])\n              + \"\\nOS           : \" + .body.data[0].osName + \" \" + .body.data[0].osArch\n              + \"\\nCore Count   : \" + ( .body.data[0].coreCount | tostring )\n              + \"\\nCPU Count    : \" + ( .body.data[0].cpuCount | tostring )\n              + \"\\nCPU ID       : \" + .body.data[0].cpuId\n              + \"\\nNeed Reboot  : \" + ( .body.data[0].threatRebootRequired | if . then \"Yes\" else \"No\" end )\n              + \"\\n\\n|   Network Info    |\"\n\t\t\t  + \"\\nExternal IP        : \" + .body.data[0].externalIp\n\t\t\t  + \"\\nInternal IP        : \" + .body.data[0].lastIpToMgmt\n\t\t\t  + \"\\nNetwork Status     : \" + (.body.data[0].networkStatus | (.[0:1] | ascii_upcase) + .[1:])\n              + \"```\"\n            )\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"context\",\n          \"elements\": [\n            {\n              \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n              \"text\": (\n                \"SentinelOne Hyperautomation | Last Sync: \"\n                + (now | gmtime | strftime(\"%d %b | %I:%M:%S %p UTC\"))\n              )\n            }\n          ]\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n"
    elif $val == "notes" then "{\n  attachments: [\n    {\n      \"color\": (\n        if \"{{local_var.current_result}}\" == \"MITIGATED\" then \n          \"#1eb883\"\n        elif \"{{local_var.current_result}}\" == \"UNMITIGATED\" and \"{{local_var.current_confidenceLevel}}\" == \"MALICIOUS\" then \n          \"#f65151\"\n        elif \"{{local_var.current_result}}\" == \"UNMITIGATED\" and \"{{local_var.current_confidenceLevel}}\" == \"SUSPICIOUS\" then \n          \"#d7b93d\"\n        else \n          \"#9562e7\"\n        end\n      ),\n      \"blocks\": [\n        {\n          \"type\": \"divider\",\n          \"block_id\": \"fxkBm\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"block_id\": \"Qyt8T\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": \"```{{edr-or-identity-alert.data.name}} on {{edr-or-identity-alert.data.asset.name}} ```\",\n            \"verbatim\": false\n          },\n          \"accessory\": {\n            \"type\": \"static_select\",\n            \"action_id\": \"static_select-action\",\n            \"initial_option\": {\n              \"text\": {\n                \"type\": \"plain_text\",\n                \"text\": \"Notes\",\n                \"emoji\": true\n              },\n              \"value\": \"notes\"\n            },\n            \"options\": [\n              {\n                \"text\": {\n                  \"type\": \"plain_text\",\n                  \"text\": \"Overview\",\n                  \"emoji\": true\n                },\n                \"value\": \"overview\"\n              },\n              {\n                \"text\": {\n                  \"type\": \"plain_text\",\n                  \"text\": \"Threat Details\",\n                  \"emoji\": true\n                },\n                \"value\": \"threat-details\"\n              },\n              {\n                \"text\": {\n                  \"type\": \"plain_text\",\n                  \"text\": \"Endpoint Details\",\n                  \"emoji\": true\n                },\n                \"value\": \"endpoint-details\"\n              },\n              {\n                \"text\": {\n                  \"type\": \"plain_text\",\n                  \"text\": \"Notes\",\n                  \"emoji\": true\n                },\n                \"value\": \"notes\"\n              }\n            ]\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"section\",\n          \"block_id\": \"VpUBb\",\n          \"text\": {\n            \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n            \"text\": (\"```|  Notes  |\\n\\n\" +\n              (.body.data.alertNotes.data\n                | map(\"[\" + .createdAt + \"]: \" + .text)\n                | join(\"\\n\\n\")\n              ) +\n              \"```\"\n            ),\n            \"verbatim\": false\n          },\n          \"accessory\": {\n            \"type\": \"image\",\n            \"image_url\": \"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Perrtyk/logos/ddd133624280ad7fb719a98caefc3efabcb9a990/s1-logo-rounded.png\",\n            \"alt_text\": \"Threat Icon\"\n          }\n        },\n        {\n          \"type\": \"context\",\n          \"elements\": [\n            {\n              \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",\n              \"text\": (\"SentinelOne Hyperautomation | Last Sync: \" + (now | gmtime | strftime(\"%d %b | %I:%M:%S %p UTC\")))\n            }\n          ]\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}"
    else "."
    end
  )
}

variables.name: isolation_endpoint
variables.value: {{Function.ACCESS_LIST_ITEM(Function.JQ(get-agent-by-uuid, ".body.data[0] | (if .networkStatus == \"connected\" then \"/web/api/v2.1/agents/actions/disconnect\" elif (.networkStatus == \"disconnected\" or .networkStatus == \"disconnecting\" or .networkStatus == \"connecting\") then \"/web/api/v2.1/agents/actions/connect\" end)"), 0)}}

variables.name: isolation_log_message
variables.value: {{Function.ACCESS_LIST_ITEM(Function.JQ(get-agent-by-uuid, ".body.data[0] | (\"["Function.DATETIME_NOW()"]: \" + (if .networkStatus == \"connected\" then \"Disconnecting  the endpoint using network isolation\" else \"Reconnecting the endpoint using network isolation\" end) + \"\\n\") \n"), 0)}}
